title: Light French Taleggio Tarte Tatin
description: A velvety, pungent French dessert from Normandy, featuring reduced Taleggio cheese, anti-inflammatory-friendly ingredients, and a delicate Tarte Tatin crust.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Spread Taleggio cheese evenly over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Drizzle balsamic vinegar and honey over the cheese.
Fold the pastry edges up over the cheese, pressing gently to seal.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Allow the tart to cool for 5 minutes before inverting onto a serving plate.
Garnish with fresh thyme sprigs, if desired.
